narrative:
North Royalton-03-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 876 registered voters, with 64.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
